title: Sharpness Enchantment Fix
description: Do you remember that the Sharpness Enchantment gives more attack damage instead of damage?
body:
_Do you remember that the Sharpness Enchantment gives more attack damage instead of damage?_

## Description:
Well with Sharpness enchantment fix, this problem is no more. the datapack makes it that for shaprness level I will be given +1 attack damage and above I will be +0.5 attack damage!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
